# Azone Projects — Assignment Help & Digital Services UAE

> Azone Projects is a trusted academic writing and digital services agency based in the UAE (Dubai, Sharjah, Abu Dhabi), established 2019. We serve students at all UAE universities and businesses across the GCC with expert assignment help, web development, graphic design, and digital marketing.

## About
- **Brand:** Azone Projects
- **Location:** SPC, Al Zahia Area, Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, Sharjah, UAE
- **Established:** 2019
- **Clients Served:** 300+ students and businesses
- **WhatsApp:** +971 55 623 0065
- **Email:** projects.azone@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://azoneprojects.com
- **Available:** 24/7 via WhatsApp for urgent orders
- **Delivery:** As fast as 6 hours for urgent assignments

## Why Choose Azone Projects (Differentiators)
- 100% original, plagiarism-free academic work — free Turnitin report with every order
- Native English-speaking expert writers with Master's and PhD qualifications
- Free 2x revisions included with all academic orders
- Free bibliography, reference list, and title page
- Transparent, affordable AED pricing — no hidden fees
- UAE-based team with deep knowledge of local university requirements
- Dedicated project manager for dissertation and thesis orders
- SPSS, NVivo, R, Stata, Excel — quantitative & qualitative data analysis supported
- Strict confidentiality — your identity and order are never disclosed

## Pricing (AED)
- Undergraduate Assignment / Essay: AED 30/page
- Undergraduate Case Study: AED 30/page
- Master's Thesis / Dissertation: AED 40/page
- Master's MBA Assignment: AED 35/page
- PhD Research Proposal: AED 45/page
- Capstone / Graduation Project: AED 800+
- Proofreading & Editing: AED 15/page
- CV Writing: AED 150
Free: Turnitin Report, 2 Revisions, Bibliography, Title Page
